seoTitle: Calico Creek vs Callandoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Calico Creek and Callandoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Calico Creek vs Callandoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Calico Creek and Callandoon.
heading: Calico Creek vs Callandoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Calico Creek, Queensland and Callandoon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Callandoon has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Calico Creek (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Calico Creek or Callandoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Calico Creek has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Callandoon scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Calico Creek scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Callandoon scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Calico Creek or Callandoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Callandoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
